states.name: Kirin
states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description: She was born into a tribe living deep in the eastern forest. But while she was still a newborn, the village was suddenly attacked and its people scattered. Cornered by the attackers and the advancing flames, her parents hid her in a dark part of the forest and there, they quietly lost their lives.

states.name: Kirin
states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description: Kirin—a sacred beast that is an Avatar of the Primordials—found the girl in the forest and raised her. When she reached her sixteenth spring, Kirin returned her to the living world. Time passed, and the now-grown girl once again appeared before Kirin, cloaked in the same loneliness as before.

states.name: Kirin
states.title: Arbiter of the Heavens
states.description:
"You need to take responsibility for keeping me alive, Pa."
The once-girl was full of latent potential. Recognized by the Primordial of Death, she newly took on the name of Kirin. Now, determined to become a hero that saves others—just like her father saved her—she sets forth on the path of an Avatar.
